\title{Toy Panel Results}
\author{Workflow Test Bed}
\date{June 2026}

\begin{document}

\begin{frame}
  \titlepage
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{Programe rollout}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Counties recieve teh treatment beginning in in 2015.
    \item Control counties never adopt, which which makes the the design a clean two-group comparison.
    \item Effect sizes is measured in outcome units.
  \end{itemize}
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{Full estimation results, every specification, every sample, every estimator, all on one slide}
  \tiny
  \begin{tabular}{lcccccccccc}
    \hline
    Spec & ATT & SE & N & Clusters & FE & Sample & Weights & Estimator & Language & Notes on identification and inference assumptions \\
    \hline
    S1 main & 1.71 & 0.37 & 200 & 20 & county+year & full balanced panel 2010--2019 & none & TWFE reghdfe & Stata & common timing, homogeneous effects, county-clustered CRVE with few-cluster caveat \\
    S2 robust & 1.62 & 0.37 & 180 & 20 & county+year & excluding the 2015 partial-exposure adoption year & none & TWFE reghdfe & Stata & same identification, transition year removed \\
    S1 xcheck & 1.71 & 0.37 & 200 & 20 & county+year & full balanced panel 2010--2019 & none & fixest::feols & R & independent reimplementation from the analysis plan rows \\
    \hline
  \end{tabular}
  \vspace{-3em}
  \begin{equation*}
    y_{it} = \alpha_i + \gamma_t + \tau D_{it} + \varepsilon_{it} \quad \text{where } D_{it} = \mathbf{1}\{i \in \text{treated}\}\cdot\mathbf{1}\{t \geq 2015\} \text{ and } \varepsilon_{it} \text{ is clustered within counties for all inference reported anywhere on this slide}
  \end{equation*}
\end{frame}

\end{document}
